summary: Classified the mixed PR inventory shard conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact as live state. Security-sensitive exact PR refs are routed to central handling; unrelated non-security PRs remain non-mutating keep classifications. No GitHub mutations are planned; close, merge, fix, and low-signal close paths are blocked by job permissions or item-specific evidence.
